caption: The video appears to be a screen recording of an online presentation or lecture, likely focused on systems thinking and its applications. The main content displayed is a visual map with interconnected nodes, each representing different concepts related to systems thinking. One of the highlighted nodes is labeled "buying/selling," which is connected to another node labeled "solving systems thinking." To the right of the screen, there is a smaller inset video showing a person, presumably the presenter, who is wearing headphones and speaking. In the background of this inset, there is an image of a group of people in what looks like a warehouse or large store, possibly illustrating a real-world scenario related to the topic being discussed. The overall setting suggests an educational or professional context, where complex ideas are being explained through visual aids and verbal narration.
